sources.citation: Yip, Ka-Fai. 2025. Inner Aspect in Cantonese. FLaP FIRST 1:15–36.
directly_establishes: 完 is analyzed as completive inner aspect
inner aspect may be followed by perfective 咗
the structural order places inner aspect below outer aspect
an overt-object 食完咗飯 example is provided
does_not_establish: the source of survey item-level variation

sources.citation: Sybesma, Rint. 2013. Cantonese sin 先 and the Question of Microvariation and Macrovariation. In Breaking Down the Barriers, 971–994.
directly_establishes: 完 may precede perfective 咗 in the verbal complex
an overt-object 食完咗啲飯 example is provided
does_not_establish: a complete analysis of completive 完
distribution across verb classes or varieties

sources.citation: Fan, Xiaolei and Kin Wing Kevin Chan. 2022. 香港粵語「咗」的語法特點：與北京話「了1」的比較. Language and Linguistics 23(3):371–410.
directly_establishes: Hong Kong Cantonese 咗 is an outer perfective marker with complex-VP placement restrictions
咗, verbal-object order, and sentence-final 喇 require separate analysis
does_not_establish: specific lexical conditions on V完咗O
regional variation outside Hong Kong Cantonese

sources.citation: Cheung, Hung-nin Samuel. 2007. 香港粵語語法的研究（增訂版）. Chinese University Press.
reported_through_secondary_source: Yip 2025 attributes 食完咗飯好耐嘍 to Cheung 2007:149
sources.required_next_action: inspect the cited page directly before treating this source as independently verified

decision.best_current_description: structurally supported and directly attested; lexical, discourse, and regional distribution unresolved
